name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 22 Apr 2022
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we launched a new functionality for improving your convenience in the signing-in process."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, please read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"﻿Signing Into Maropost Identity with Google and Microsoft Accounts","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now sign in to your Maropost account using your Google and Microsoft accounts too. While signing in with your Google account doesn’t require any additional setup, signing in with Microsoft account requires that you perform a one-time step of linking the accounts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/LoginPage.0685g000006y6JdAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/LoginPage.0685g000006y6JdAAI.png","name":"Login Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1197,"width":1009}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Signing In With Google","bold":true}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"On the Login page, click the SIGN IN WITH GOOGLE button. "}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Next, you’ll be shown all the Google accounts that are signed in the browser. Select the account with which you want to sign in."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/GoogleLogin.0685g000006y6JnAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/GoogleLogin.0685g000006y6JnAAI.png","name":"Google Login","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1030,"width":1060}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Finally, you are required to authenticate using OTP. And after successful authentication, you’ll be directed to the Marketing Cloud dashboard."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Signing In With Microsoft","bold":true}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"On the Login page, click the SIGN IN WITH MICROSOFT button. "}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Next, you’ll be shown all the accounts that are signed in the browser. Select the account with which you want to sign in."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/MicrosoftLogin.0685g000006y6JxAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/MicrosoftLogin.0685g000006y6JxAAI.png","name":"Microsoft Login","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1044,"width":900}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If this is the first time you are using your Microsoft account for logging into Maropost, then you’ll need to perform a one-time activation process. This includes providing permission and activating the connection. "}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Permission","bold":true},{"text":": Click Accept to allow Maropost to access your Microsoft data for signing you in."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/MicrosoftPermission.0685g000006y6VqAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/MicrosoftPermission.0685g000006y6VqAAI.png","name":"Microsoft - Permission","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1022,"width":890}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Activation","bold":true},{"text":": Sign in using either your Maropost credentials or Google credentials. This will link the Microsoft account to the Maropost account for the purpose of signing in."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/MicrosoftActivation.0685g000006y6VbAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/MicrosoftActivation.0685g000006y6VbAAI.png","name":"Microsoft - Activation","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":984,"width":652}}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Finally, you are required to authenticate using OTP. After successful authentication, you’ll be directed to the Marketing Cloud dashboard."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
